changeSet.author: transfer_service
changeSet.sql:
-- Вставка тестовых данных в таблицу outbox_events с UUID correlation_id INSERT INTO outbox_events (aggregate_type, aggregate_id, event_type, payload, correlation_id, status, retry_count, created_at, updated_at) VALUES -- Отправленные события (используем реальные UUID) ('Transfer', '1', 'DEBIT_REQUEST', '{"accountId": "ACC001", "amount": 1000.00, "currency": "USD", "transferId": 1, "correlationId": "a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890"}', 'a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890', 'SENT', 0, '2024-01-15 10:00:01', '2024-01-15 10:00:01'), ('Transfer', '1', 'CREDIT_REQUEST', '{"accountId": "ACC002", "amount": 1000.00, "currency": "USD", "transferId": 1, "correlationId": "a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890"}', 'a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890', 'SENT', 0, '2024-01-15 10:00:05', '2024-01-15 10:00:05'),
-- Новые события ожидающие отправки ('Transfer', '4', 'DEBIT_REQUEST', '{"accountId": "ACC004", "amount": 1200.00, "currency": "USD", "transferId": 4, "correlationId": "d4e5f6a7-b8c9-0123-def0-345678901234"}', 'd4e5f6a7-b8c9-0123-def0-345678901234', 'NEW', 0, '2024-01-16 09:15:01', '2024-01-16 09:15:01'),
-- События для неудачных переводов ('Transfer', '6', 'DEBIT_REQUEST', '{"accountId": "ACC006", "amount": 2000.00, "currency": "USD", "transferId": 6, "correlationId": "f6a7b8c9-d0e1-2345-f012-567890123456"}', 'f6a7b8c9-d0e1-2345-f012-567890123456', 'SENT', 0, '2024-01-16 11:45:01', '2024-01-16 11:45:01'),
-- События для компенсированных переводов ('Transfer', '8', 'DEBIT_REQUEST', '{"accountId": "ACC008", "amount": 800.00, "currency": "USD", "transferId": 8, "correlationId": "a8b9c0d1-e2f3-4567-1234-789012345678"}', 'a8b9c0d1-e2f3-4567-1234-789012345678', 'SENT', 0, '2024-01-16 15:00:01', '2024-01-16 15:00:01'), ('Transfer', '8', 'CREDIT_REQUEST', '{"accountId": "ACC009", "amount": 800.00, "currency": "USD", "transferId": 8, "correlationId": "a8b9c0d1-e2f3-4567-1234-789012345678"}', 'a8b9c0d1-e2f3-4567-1234-789012345678', 'SENT', 0, '2024-01-16 15:00:05', '2024-01-16 15:00:05'), ('Transfer', '8', 'COMPENSATE_DEBIT', '{"accountId": "ACC008", "amount": 800.00, "currency": "USD", "transferId": 8, "correlationId": "a8b9c0d1-e2f3-4567-1234-789012345678"}', 'a8b9c0d1-e2f3-4567-1234-789012345678', 'SENT', 0, '2024-01-16 15:00:10', '2024-01-16 15:00:10');
